-0.0011*exp(-0.3157*x_2 + 0.7335*sinh(1.3661 - 1.6407*x_4) - 0.6062*tanh(3.1161*x_1 - 4.5186) - 0.1754*Abs(5.2462*x_3 - 7.6596)) + 0.0889*exp(-0.0532*exp(0.4172*x_3) + 0.0982*sin(1.6147*x_2 + 7.9823) + 0.4289*sin(1.0128*x_4 - 5.1077) - 0.0889*sinh(1.0164 - 1.6368*x_1)) - 0.0439*sin(0.2145*(0.6983 - x_2)**2 - 0.0648*exp(1.3409*x_1) + 0.1015*exp(1.0232*x_4) - 1.1676*sin(0.9412*x_3 + 7.8233) + 2.5821) - 0.0114*sinh(-0.1454*sin(3.1855*x_2 + 9.9901) + 0.8083*sin(1.0187*x_3 - 3.6324) + 2.8892*tanh(0.8137*x_1 - 1.1866) + 1.0825*tanh(1.7964*x_4 - 2.9037) + 1.7389) - 0.2235
